payment.title: Payment Method
payment.secureNote: Your payment is secured with 256-bit SSL encryption
payment.confirmingNote: Please wait while we confirm your payment status
payment.successMessage: Your order has been confirmed and is being processed
payment.pendingMessage: Your payment is being processed. This may take a few minutes.
payment.pendingLongMessage: Your payment is being verified. This usually takes a few minutes. You can check your order status in your orders page.
payment.failedMessage: We couldn't process your payment. Please try again.
payment.failedLongMessage: Your payment could not be processed. Your order has been created but not paid. You can try paying again from your order details page.
payment.emailNote: You'll receive an order confirmation email shortly
payment.trackNote: Track your order status in your orders page
payment.shipNote: We'll notify you when your order ships

success.title: Order Placed!
success.message: Thank you for your order. We'll send a confirmation to your email.
